Privacy Policy

Gaviom Inc. (“Gaviom,” “we”) explains how we collect, use, and share personal information when you use gaviom.com and enter our sweepstakes.

Information we collect

Name, email, phone, mailing address, payment details (processed by payment partners), entry history, IP/device data, and communications you send us.

How we use it

  • Administer entries, drawings, and prize fulfillment
  • Verify eligibility and prevent fraud
  • Send transactional messages (confirmations, winner notices)
  • Marketing emails only if you opt in
  • Legal compliance and tax reporting (e.g., 1099 forms)

Sharing

We share data with payment processors, email providers, prize fulfillment partners, and authorities when required by law. We do not sell personal information for money.

Retention

We retain entry and winner records as required for sweepstakes law, tax, and dispute resolution, typically at least three (3) years for audit purposes.

Your rights

Depending on your state, you may request access, correction, or deletion of certain data. Contact privacy@gaviom.com. California residents may have additional rights under the CCPA/CPRA.

Children

Our services are not directed to anyone under 18. We do not knowingly collect data from minors.

Gaviom Inc., PO Box 4218, Wilmington, DE 19801 · Last updated May 21, 2026
